name: 隱藏身份懸念
description: 早期即暗示Michelle是神秘導演M和巴克萊家族繼承人，但所有角色（包括丈夫）都不知道。觀眾比劇中角色掌握更多資訊，這種「戲劇性反諷」讓觀眾持續期待揭露時刻的到來。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: It's our third anniversary, Richard, and you're absent as usual. You don't even know I'm the director of Love Before Dawn. ... The gallows may be stupid enough to not realize that you're the legendary director M, but we always knew. Plus, you're the only heir to the Barlay Sovereign Bank.
